name: USS LCI(L)-1098 (LCI(L)-1098)
events: 6 May 1945 After repairs, USS Balao (Lt.Cdr. R.K. Worthington, USN), departed Saipan to resume her 9th war patrol. She was escorted out by USS LCI(L)-1098.
6 May 1945 USS Balao (Lt.Cdr. R.K. Worthington, USN) arrived at Saipan. She was escorted in by USS LCI(L)-1098.
9 May 1945 USS Bang (Lt.Cdr. O.W. Bagby, Jr., USN) departed Saipan for Pearl Harbor. She was escorted out by USS LCI(L)-1098.
22 Jul 1945 USS Archerfish (Cdr. J.F. Enright, USN) arrived at Saipan. She was escorted in by USS LCI(L)-1098.
